import io
import string
import list

fn read_byte(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(b)
    b
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = read_byte(s, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      mut sign = 1
      mut j = i
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
        j = j + 1
      else if b == 43
        j = j + 1
      end
      mut val = 0
      mut done = false
      while not done
        if j >= n
          done = true
        else
          let c = read_byte(s, j)
          if c >= 48 and c <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (c - 48)
            j = j + 1
          else
            done = true
          end
        end
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, val * sign)
      i = j
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn insert_sorted(_ sorted: List<Int>, _ x: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = sorted.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match sorted.get(i)
    when Some(y)
      y
    when None
      0
    end
    if not inserted and x <= v
      result = list.push(result, x)
      inserted = true
    end
    result = list.push(result, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    result = list.push(result, x)
  end
  result
end

fn sort_list(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = nums.len()
  while i < n
    let v = match nums.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    sorted = insert_sorted(sorted, v)
    i = i + 1
  end
  sorted
end

let line = match io.read_line()
when Some(s)
  s
when None
  ""
end

let nums = parse_ints(line)
let sorted = sort_list(nums)

mut out = ""
mut i = 0
let n = sorted.len()
while i < n
  let v = match sorted.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if i == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
println(out)
